lessons.title: Unit 1A: Greetings - Lesson 1: Hello!
lessons.desc:
- Hi, Hello, Goodbye, Bye, ant, apple
- Letter Aa and sound /æ/ 
- What's your name? I'm (Tony).
 Nice to meet you!
 What is this? It's (an apple).
